title: Spencer Keller’s CV
text:
Tax associate, entrepeneur, follower of Christ.

My linkedin page

Download PDF



I am currently an intern at Smith Kunz & Associates, where I assist with the preparation of both personal and business tax returns. In this role, I work with financial documents, organize client information, and support the tax team in ensuring accurate and timely filings. This experience has strengthened my understanding of tax regulations, attention to detail, and ability to handle sensitive financial data in a professional environment.



Private client tax services, individual and business tax return preparation, and business entity selection for tax optimization. Experience with partnership taxation, including K-1 analysis, and exposure to state and local tax (SALT) compliance and multistate apportionment. Skilled in identifying tax credits and deductions, financial data analysis, and ensuring compliance with federal and state regulations. Strong focus on accuracy, efficiency, and handling sensitive financial information.



Expected April 2026 Brigham Young University – Idaho, Rexburg, Idaho
Bachelor of Science in Accounting (GPA: 3.42) Cluster in Data Science



January 2026 – Present Smith Kunz & Associates, Rexburg, ID
Prepared and filed 50+ federal and state individual and business tax returns Utilized TaxDome and UltraTax to streamline workflows and identify deductions and credits
June 2025 – August 2025 Andersen, Los Angeles, CA
Prepared and reviewed partnership K-1s, analyzing income, deductions, and credits Supported state and local tax (SALT) engagements, including multistate compliance and tax research
April 2023 – December 2024 Ecoshield Pest Solutions, Nashville, TN
Generated $280K in personal revenue through consultative sales Managed and mentored a sales team producing $500K+ in revenue Led training sessions focused on communication, objection handling, and closing strategies



October 2023 – Present BYU-Idaho Club Volleyball Team Captain; led team to Mountain West Championship Earned All–Mountain West First Team honors
August 2020 – September 2022 The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints, Florianópolis, Brazil
Trained and supported 150 missionaries across 30 cities Provided mentorship, leadership, and performance feedback in diverse environments



Programming in VBA, SQL, Python, and RStudio, with experience applying data analysis techniques. Fluent in Portuguese, conversational in Spanish, and native in English.
